name: studio-test-harness-full-control
description: Exercise the high-control Studio harness commands for catalog grants, bounded wall destruction, feedback, player attributes, lighting, generic GUI control, and production-surface isolation.

args.code: local H=game:GetService('HttpService') local a=game.ServerStorage.PunchWallTestHarness local remote=game.ReplicatedStorage:FindFirstChild('PunchWallTestHarness',true) local r=a:Invoke({command='Sequence',steps={{command='Reset'},{command='ApplyPreset',target='Stress'},{command='SetPlayerAttribute',target={name='HarnessQC',value='ACTIVE'}},{command='GrantAllFists',target='Celestial Titan Fist'},{command='GrantAllPets'},{command='GrantAllPremium',target='WithProducts'},{command='EmitFeedback',target={type='Reward',target='HARNESS QC',coins=123}},{command='BreakDepthRegion',target={layer=1,columnFrom=6,columnTo=7,row=1,force=true,attempts=1,limit=2}},{command='SetLighting',target={clockTime=14,brightness=2,globalShadows=true}}}}) return H:JSONEncode({ok=r.ok,count=r.count,failed=r.failedStep,remoteAbsent=remote==nil})

local H=game:GetService('HttpService') local p=game.Players:GetPlayers()[1] local s=p.RPGStats local blocks=workspace.PunchWallRPG['Depth Blocks'] local b1=blocks:FindFirstChild('DepthBlock_L001_C06_R01') local b2=blocks:FindFirstChild('DepthBlock_L001_C07_R01') return H:JSONEncode({ok=p:GetAttribute('HarnessQC')=='ACTIVE' and s.OwnedFistsJSON.Value:find('Titan Gauntlet',1,true)~=nil and s.OwnedPremiumFistsJSON.Value:find('Celestial Titan Fist',1,true)~=nil and s.OwnedPremiumPetsJSON.Value:find('Celestial Guardian',1,true)~=nil and s.PetInventoryJSON.Value~='[]' and b1:GetAttribute('Broken')==true and b2:GetAttribute('Broken')==true and game.Lighting.ClockTime==14 and game.Lighting.Brightness==2,attribute=p:GetAttribute('HarnessQC'),fist=s.EquippedFist.Value,fistMultiplier=s.FistMultiplier.Value,petMultiplier=s.PetMultiplier.Value,b1=b1:GetAttribute('Broken'),b2=b2:GetAttribute('Broken'),clock=game.Lighting.ClockTime})

local H=game:GetService('HttpService') local g=game.Players.LocalPlayer.PlayerGui.PunchWallHUD local a=g.PunchWallClientTestHarness local r=a:Invoke({command='Sequence',steps={{command='SetGuiAttribute',value={attribute='HarnessClientQC',value='ACTIVE'}},{command='SetGuiVisible',value={name='HeroSpinModal',visible=false}},{command='RequestAction',value={action='RequestSync'}},{command='GetGuiSummary'}}}) task.wait(.2) local summary=a:Invoke({command='GetGuiSummary'}).result return H:JSONEncode({ok=r.ok and r.count==4 and g:GetAttribute('HarnessClientQC')=='ACTIVE' and summary.ok and summary.total>40 and (g:GetAttribute('FeedbackCount') or 0)>0,count=r.count,total=summary.total,attribute=g:GetAttribute('HarnessClientQC'),feedback=g:GetAttribute('FeedbackCount') or 0})

local a=game.ServerStorage.PunchWallTestHarness local r=a:Invoke({command='Sequence',steps={{command='SetPlayerAttribute',target={name='HarnessQC',value=nil}},{command='SetWorldResetEnabled',target=true},{command='SetLighting',target={clockTime=14,brightness=2,globalShadows=true}},{command='Reset'}}}) return r.ok and r.count==4 and 'SERVER_RESTORED' or 'SERVER_RESTORE_FAILED'
